(b) As, (5 - 1) × (6 - 3) = 12 and (7 - 3) × (8 - 3) = 20
Similarly, ? = (7 - 2) × (6 - 3) = 15
Hence, option (b) is the correct answer.

(d) Letters are given their positions in the English alphabet to obtain the numbers given at the bottom.
As, N T 14 20 Similarly, 2 B P
Hence, P is the missing character.

(d) 2, (2)³ = 8, 3, (3)³ = 27, 4, (4)³ = 64
So, the missing number is 64.

(d) As 6 × 7 - 5 = 42 - 5 = 37 and 5 × 6 - 7 = 30 - 7 = 23
Similarly, 4 × 5 - 6 = 20 - 6 = 14
Hence, 14 is the missing number.

(d) As, (3)², (4)² ÷ 916 and (2)² × (6)² ÷ 436
Similarly, (1)²(5)² ÷ 125
Hence, option (d) is the correct answer

(d) Here, total of the numbers is on the opposite side.
As, 26 + 13 = 39, 11 + 24 = 35
and 25 + 9 = 34
Similarly, 7 + ? = 35
∴ ? = 28

(b) Number in 3rd column = 2 × 1st block number + 3 × 2nd block number.
As, (2 × 13) + (3 × 11) = 59
and (2 × 9) + (3 × 17) = 69
Similarly, (2 × 5) + (3 × 13) = 49
Hence, the missing number is 5.

(b) Across each column,
Number in 3rd cell = (Number in 2nd cell)² - (Number in 1st cell)²
(1)² - (1)² = 120
(7)² - (2)² = 45
Similarly, (5)² - (3)² = 16
Hence, the missing number is 16.

(b) In the first column, each number is multiplied by 5 to get the next number
i.e., 1 × 5 = 5
5 × 5 = 25
25 × 5 = 125
Similarly, in 2nd column each number is multiplied by 4 to get the next number
i.e., 3 × 4 = 12, 12 × 4 = 48
and 48 × 4 = 192.
Hence, the missing number is 48.

(c) Number in 1st row = 7 × Number in 2nd row.
Number in 3rd row = 2 × Number in 4th row.
Hence, the missing number is 123.

(d) As, 4 × 2 - (5 + 3) = 0
7 × 4 - (3 + 4) = 21
6 × 5 - (4 + 4) = 22
Similarly, 9 × 5 - (6 + 5) = 34
Hence, option (a) is the correct answer.

(c) Each row consists of letters K, L and M. The difference in numeric portion of 3rd column is 2.
Hence, the missing term is K 14.

(c) Each block comprises of two letters and a number. Letters occur in pairs with a gap of one letter in between. The 1st letter of 3rd block in each row is the letter next to the 2nd alphabet of 2nd block. Number in 3rd block of each row is 2 more than the sum of 1st and 2nd block numbers.
Hence, NP36 is the correct answer.
